positive: A stylized, minimalist design of a cosmic animal silhouette, featuring a majestic fox howling at a crescent moon. The fox is rendered in clean, geometric lines with vibrant sapphire blue accents against a deep indigo night sky background. Incorporate subtle, celestial nebula swirls and small, stylized star constellations (like Orion's belt) framing the main subject. The composition must be perfectly centered, highly contrasting, and optimized for textile print, utilizing negative space effectively. The style should evoke retro-futurism combined with Art Nouveau elegance, presented as a single, unified, high-contrast graphic graphic. Flat vector aesthetic, screen print quality, suitable for t-shirt printing. --ar 1:1 --v 6.0
